title: euphorbia esula var. subracemosa
intro: Euphorbia esula var. subracemosa, also known as the Russian spurge, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Euphorbia esula var. subracemosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or ointments, which are used to treat a range of health issues, and it is also used as an ingredient in some traditional remedies, such as salves and tinctures.
